1815980.name: Hovercars 3077: Underground Soundtrack
1815980.description:
Information about soundtrack

The soundtrack was created in collaboration with the best underground artists who have not seen the sun in a long time. They call them musical vampires. So, here's the full soundtrack of Hovercars 3077: Underground. You will find cyberpunk songs full of energy with vocals (rap, EDM etc.), but not only, there are some chill songs. The soundtrack also includes unused tracks that have never appeared in the game. This is a feast for collectors.

Soundtrack is from the game
